---
title: "cosineSimilarity()"
description: "Cosine similarity over zero-padded vectors. Non-finite results normalize to 0."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Cosine similarity over zero-padded vectors. Non-finite results normalize to 0.

## Import

```ts
import { cosineSimilarity } from "@graphrefly/ts/patterns";
```

## Signature

```ts
function cosineSimilarity(
	a: readonly number[],
	b: readonly number[],
): number
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `a` | `readonly number[]` | a value used by the helper. |
| `b` | `readonly number[]` | b value used by the helper. |

## Returns

A `number` value.

## Example

```ts
import { cosineSimilarity } from "@graphrefly/ts/patterns";
```

`packages/ts/src/patterns/semantic-memory.ts`
